raw_consumer_statement: AMEX is refusing to investigate and reverse a charge on my credit card for which I have received NO services/goods from the so-called merchant. AMEX is discriminating against me as a minority. During a call that was recorded with an AMEX agent, the AMEX agent made disparing remarks about me and discriminated against me- including making statements about my job ( even though I never advised the agent what I do for an occupation ). AMEX should not discriminate against minorities.
